response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — critical gaps for a CTO role in high-stakes AI-driven fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in building event-driven, scalable systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture advocacy via workshops, TDD, CI/CD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal indication of real-time credit risk, working-capital, or compliance infrastructure in financial systems
